name: Contract End-Date Summary (Next 30 Days)
description: Search Drive for contract docs, extract end dates via Google Docs, filter next 30 days, generate HTML summary table, send email. Tests Drive search + Docs read + AI extraction + date filtering. Exercises WP-35 (Phase A array-index syntax `{{var.field[N].subfield}}` — first folder match from search result) and WP-36 (Phase D stub generator emits realistic document names so `contains_any [Contract, Agreement, MSA, SOW, Order Form, Statement of Work]` keyword filter has non-empty input). Pre-WP-35, Phase A flagged 2 errors on the array-index ref pattern; pre-WP-36, Phase D scatter-gather was aborted by `on_empty:throw` because the generic `mock_name_NNN` fallback dropped all 3 mock items.
